name: data-collection-pro
description: Data Collection Pro — Enterprise data management application

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "client,server" -c "cyan,yellow" "npm --prefix client run dev" "npm --prefix server run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix server install
scripts.build: npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server run build && xcopy /E /I /Y client\dist server\public
